item.title: Gothic Conjuration Ritual of Buer
item.description:
Preparation (Traditional)

  • Construct the ritual circle, inscribed with divine names (typically in Latin or Hebrew transliteration).

  • Prepare the Triangle of Art for the spirit to appear within.

  • Have the Seal of Buer ready, either worn on your person (as a ring or medallion) or displayed within the triangle.

  • Prepare incense (typically frankincense or a Mars-aligned mixture).

  • Tools include: sword or wand, consecrated parchment, ritual garments, and a book or document to receive the spirit’s answers.

item.title: Gothic Conjuration Ritual of Glasya-Labolas
item.description:
25th Spirit of the Ars Goetia

Rank: President and Earl
Legions Commanded: 36

Classical Attributes (per Ars Goetia):

“He is a Mighty President and Earl, appearing in the form of a dog with wings like a griffin. He teacheth all arts in an instant, and is the author and captain of all manslaughters and bloodshed. He teacheth all things past and to come. He causeth the love of friends and foes. He can make men invisible and is an excellent familiar. He governeth 36 legions of spirits.”
